description: A plain candid color photograph taken inside a modern, brightly-lit airport terminal checkpoint area (per the tweet, LaGuardia). The foreground features white-and-blue self-service kiosks with IDEMIA-branded screens/scanners. In the mid-ground, an officer in tactical/duty uniform (olive-green attire with a 'POLICE' marked vest and a holstered sidearm) stands at a podium counter; scattered travelers with luggage move through the wide carpeted concourse beneath rows of recessed ceiling lights, with floor-to-ceiling frosted glass panels and greenery to the right. There is no on-image text, slogan, agency seal, or graphic-design overlay; it is a documentary photo of ICE personnel assisting at a TSA checkpoint. Not a designed meme/poster.
